query_normalized: evaluating the calibration of predictive uncertainty intervals in public regression benchmarks statistics
rationale: The paper studies prediction intervals and provides theoretical guarantees on coverage probability (i.e., calibration) and average width, directly addressing the same mechanism (calibration of predictive uncertainty intervals) that the user’s question concerns (criterion (a)). It therefore constitutes relevant prior work for a literature review on evaluating calibration of uncertainty intervals in regression benchmarks.
